column1: # Classic ESP32 4MB flash — dual-OTA layout for resource-constrained boards
# Mirrors the 16MB partitions.csv structure so the same OTA/rollback workflow and
# NVS layout carry over — only the app-slot SIZES shrink to fit 4MB:
#   * nvs kept BYTE-IDENTICAL to the 16MB layout (offset 0x9000
#     WiFi creds + admin PIN are layout-compatible across boards. Do NOT move it.
#     image if ever needed. 64KB-aligned (MMU requirement). ~128KB left free at top.
